flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Rocky Mountain College fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (40.6% → 28.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rocky Mountain College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.3k → $35.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rocky Mountain College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.3k → $35.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rocky Mountain College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
